prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年（理科）最低位次约426名，2024年（物理类）约393名，2025年（物理类）约307名，近三年位次持续前移，累计前移约119名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准位次约307名；该校在甘肃省2023-2025年物理类（理科）招生计划均为2人，2026年计划扩至4人，增幅达100%，属于大幅扩招，将显著缓解竞争压力，推动最低录取位次后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，哈工大本部2026年软科中国大学排名第12位（Top20），学校层次顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强；哈工大2026年高考周期声誉评价为中性/混合，无明显负面舆情；抖音学校热度总排名第10位（高热），短视频曝光量大，反映报考关注度持续升温，对位次有前移压力；依托哈工大本部学科实力，拥有力学A+、机械工程A+、材料科学与工程A+、环境科学与工程A+、计算机科学与技术A等17个A-及以上学科，工科实力全国顶尖；深圳校区招生专业聚焦计算机、电子通信、人工智能等热门方向，学科优势突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度持续高热推荐，电气工程及其自动化高热推荐，相关专业报考意愿强；甘肃省2026年物理类考生估算约14.6万人，较2025年增长约20%，考生规模扩大加剧整体竞争；哈尔滨工业大学（深圳）位于深圳市，属于一线城市，地域优势明显，对全国考生有较强吸引力；该校在甘肃省招生计划极少（2025年仅2人），属于稀缺名额，竞争基数远大于计划数。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划大幅扩招100%（从2人增至4人）这一最核心利好因素，最低录取位次将较2025年明显后移；但考生规模增长约20%、学校声誉热度高、专业方向热门等因素会部分抵消扩招效应。经供需弹性计算基准位次约491名，结合竞争环境微调后，预测2026年最低位次约481名，区间423-539名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（423-539名）内建议以二档自主智能方向为主攻目标、一档未来信息方向冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（423名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌计算机方向。由于该校在甘肃招生名额极少（仅4人），报考风险较高，建议同时准备同层次其他985高校作为备选。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023 (Science), the minimum ranking was approximately 426; in 2024 (Physics Category), approximately 393; in 2025 (Physics Category), approximately 307. Rankings have consistently moved forward over the past three years, with a cumulative forward shift of about 119 places, indicating intensifying competition year by year. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 307. The enrollment plan for this university in Gansu Province for Physics Category (Science) from 2023 to 2025 was 2 students each year, but in 2026 it will expand to 4 students, an increase of 100%, which is a significant expansion that will notably alleviate competition pressure and push the minimum admission ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, HIT's main campus ranks 12th (Top 20), indicating a top-tier university level that strongly attracts high-scoring candidates. The reputation evaluation for HIT during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is neutral/mixed, with no significant negative public opinion. The university's overall popularity on Douyin ranks 10th (high heat), with substantial short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising attention from applicants, which exerts pressure for rankings to move forward. Relying on the academic strength of HIT's main campus, it boasts 17 A- or higher disciplines, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, and Computer Science and Technology A, making its engineering strength top in the country. The Shenzhen campus focuses on popular fields such as computer science, electronic communication, and artificial intelligence, with outstanding disciplinary advantages.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science and Electronic Information/Communication majors continue to be highly recommended with strong social heat, and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also highly recommended, indicating strong willingness to apply for related majors. The estimated number of Physics Category candidates in Gansu Province in 2026 is about 146,000, an increase of approximately 20% compared to 2025, which expands the overall competition. Harbin Institute of Technology (Shenzhen) is located in Shenzhen, a first-tier city, with obvious geographical advantages that strongly attract candidates nationwide. The university has very few enrollment slots in Gansu Province (only 2 in 2025), making it a scarce opportunity, with the competition base far exceeding the number of slots.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the most core favorable factor of a significant 100% expansion in the 2026 enrollment plan (from 2 to 4 students), the minimum admission ranking will notably move backward compared to 2025. However, factors such as a 20% increase in candidate numbers, high university reputation and heat, and popular major directions will partially offset the expansion effect. After supply-demand elasticity calculation, the baseline ranking is approximately 491. With fine-tuning based on the competitive environment, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 481, with a range of 423-539.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Information) (Computer Science and Technology, Communication Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Autonomous Intelligence) (Artificial Intelligence, Robotics Engineering, Automation).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- None (This university only offers the above two Engineering Experimental Class directions in Gansu Province, both of which are high-scoring popular majors, with no traditionally low-scoring majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (423-539), it is recommended to target the Tier 2 Autonomous Intelligence direction as the main goal and aim for the Tier 1 Future Information direction as a stretch. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 423), you can focus on aiming for the Tier 1 top computer science direction. Due to the very limited enrollment slots in Gansu (only 4), the application risk is high, so it is advisable to also prepare other 985 universities at the same level as backups.
